body_preview: Prevent the same run ID from appearing multiple times in the incomplete-runs list shown by `yyds state why last-failure` when no failure is found. Why this matters: The assessment noted that `state why last-failure` shows duplicate run IDs in the incomplete runs list (e.g., `github-actions-27593785970` appearing twice). title: Deduplicate incomplete run IDs in state why last-failure display
